steps.title: Identify the size-measurement signal
steps.content: The passage states the plant's size as “approximately 200 square kilometers.” This is a measurement of the area the plant occupies.

steps.title: Match the word to the measurement
steps.content: ”Spans” directly means the plant extends across or covers this area. The other three describe unrelated concepts (acknowledging, producing, advancing) that don't express geographic coverage. That is the correct answer.
